If you experience any of the following signs, it’s important to consult with your Ob-Gyn promptly: Abnormal vaginal bleeding or discharge Pain during intercourse Persistent pelvic pain or discomfort Unexplained weight loss or gain Irregular menstrual cycles Severe abdominal bloating I am a patient of Dr. Yashica and she is one of the sweetest and caring and honest people out there.
